conflict: A storm blackout, the temporary possibility of escape, and the truth Marisol has never admitted aloud.
consequence: Marisol and Gabriel reach brutal honesty about the past, destroying fantasy while making genuine collaboration possible.
must_land_beats: Make the extraction feel improvised, physical, and precarious rather than slick.
Use Retiro Sur as a space of rust, memory, and stalled time.
Have Marisol name the old cover-up in full concrete terms.
End not with forgiveness but with a choice about what truth now demands.
